{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032017101875A5764E23FB9413DC68\"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604383717733696280","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个题材可以看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770535782,"group_id":"7601175404828707865","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nw6FdST1jjDA0ue8a1rDaoybJCcydiYcnyKqu0CKUBpL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3743164950649886","user_name":"喜欢野当归的朱鸿志"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3743164950649886","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601175404828707865","book_info":{"abstract":"突然游戏世界降临，不甘平庸的他，或许是幸运女神的眷顾，在一次一次竞技中获得属性、异能，最终在现实中成为站在世界顶端的存在，最后发现游戏世界的奥秘，原来我们也是生活在另一种游戏当中。\n在游戏世界降临后，18岁以上，70岁以下全民投身竞技游戏，每3天强制参加一场。竞技游戏初始统一强制参加，参加五次之后，可以自由选择参加或者不参加，但是一个月内至少参加一次。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/afc0dfdf9a8ebe1429b209415576dc1d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"卡皮特韦","author_id":"","book_id":"7601175404828707865","book_name":"游戏降临现实：绝境竞技","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":746,\"name\":\"游戏体育\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746\u0026name=游戏体育\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":372,\"name\":\"网游\",\"sche
